title: Ports Declare Required Capabilities

checks.description: port and adapter-binding patterns are valid and production-covered
checks.command: rta check --pattern-specs --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --pattern-contracts --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --production --root fixtures/golden/pass

decision: Ports are named capability requirements owned by an app context. Concrete adapters bind those ports per target instead of domain code importing ambient IO, connector clients, or deployment details.
